title: Add Code Canvas Complete to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Code Canvas Complete](https://code-canvas-complete-production.up.railway.app/) to build
- Code Canvas is an all-in-one browser-based IDE with a built-in AI assistant for code generation, debugging, and explanation. It integrates Pollinations.ai as a Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) AI provider, a

Fixes #11662

gist.headline: A canvas for code bees
gist.blurb: Code Canvas Complete has joined the garden: a browser-based IDE where an AI assistant helps write, debug, and explain the mysterious little spells we call code. Bring your own Pollinations key and let the pixels get to work.
gist.summary: Added Code Canvas Complete to the Pollinations build directory, highlighting its browser-based IDE with BYOK Pollinations.ai support for AI code generation, debugging, and explanations.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover a complete in-browser coding workspace that connects their own Pollinations API key to an assistant for writing, fixing, and understanding code.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Code Canvas Complete as a cozy browser-based coding studio: a large retro terminal canvas shows neat code, helpful AI suggestion bubbles, and a tiny bug being gently debugged with a magnifying glass. Polly, wearing a small developer headset, collaborates at the desk while code-plants grow from pots around the monitor, representing an IDE that helps code ideas grow through a user-provided Pollinations key.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a friendly browser-based IDE on a chunky CRT monitor, its code canvas glowing prominently lime green (#ecf874) with tidy code blocks, a small AI helper sparkle, and a tiny pixel bug being inspected with a magnifying glass; code-plants and warm flowers grow around the desk. The main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings; she wears tiny developer headphones and warmly points at the code beside the monitor. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, dark purple (#110518) outlines, pixel-font text: "CODE CANVAS".
